title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: August 25, 2022
summary: August 25, 2022: over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a higher rate from last week of 9.18% , from the level on 08/18/2022 of 5.929 M km 2 to 5.385 M km 2 for this week. We are still a few weeks out from bottoming out for the year and at this point we have taken a bit of turn towards...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 22 August, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 22 August, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
